---
title: "ACF Widget"
---

## Overview

Developer documentation for `ACFWidget`, which displays autocorrelation function plots.

## Source Location

`src/WhiskerToolbox/Plots/ACFWidget/`

## Architecture

*TODO: Document widget architecture, state management, and key classes.*

## Key Classes

- `ACFWidget` — Main widget class

## See Also

- [Plot Widget Guide](../plot_widget_guide.md)
